name: Google Ads
description: Google Ads API lets you programmatically manage advertising campaigns across Google Search, Display, YouTube, and Shopping. Use it to create and manage campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, bidding strategies, and to pull performance reports using Google Ads Query Language (GAQL).

capabilities.name: search_campaigns
capabilities.description: Query and retrieve campaigns with their settings, status, budget, and performance metrics using GAQL.

capabilities.name: manage_campaign
capabilities.description: Create, update, pause, or enable a campaign. Configure budget, bidding strategy, targeting, and network settings.

capabilities.name: manage_ad_group
capabilities.description: Create, update, or remove ad groups within a campaign. Set ad group-level bids and targeting criteria.

capabilities.name: manage_ads
capabilities.description: Create, update, pause, or remove ads within an ad group. Supports responsive search ads, display ads, and video ads.

capabilities.name: manage_keywords
capabilities.description: Add, update, or remove keyword criteria in ad groups. Set match types, bids, and negative keywords.

capabilities.name: get_performance_report
capabilities.description: Run a GAQL query to retrieve performance metrics like impressions, clicks, cost, conversions, and CTR across any resource.

capabilities.name: manage_conversions
capabilities.description: Upload offline conversions, create conversion actions, and track conversion data to measure campaign effectiveness.
